description: Fix hex plan reconcile to require positive file evidence (file exists + declared symbol present + commit id match) before promoting a task to done. Remove passive reconcile triggers (hooks, daemon ticks, file watchers) — reconcile mutates only on explicit invocation. Add observability: brain queue history, reconcile --dry-run / --why / --force. Surfaced live during wp-hex-native-web-search: daemon correctly ran P1.1+P1.2 (commits 19928ffc, 1d1e40b9) then reconcile marked 11 downstream tasks done despite their files not existing; a passive loop re-asserted the false state after manual edits.

phases.name: Evidence-verified reconcile (file + symbol + commit)
phases.description: Reconcile must check: every path in task.files[] exists AND at least one declared symbol from the description appears in at least one declared file AND a commit matching the task id exists in the branch history. If any check fails, the task stays pending. No heuristic override.

tasks.name: Evidence collector + verifier pure functions
tasks.description: hex-cli/src/commands/plan/reconcile_evidence.rs: pub fn collect_evidence(task: &WorkplanTask, repo_root: &Path, branch: &str) -> TaskEvidence { files_exist: Vec<(PathBuf, bool)>, declared_symbols: Vec<String>, symbol_hits: Vec<(String, PathBuf)>, matching_commits: Vec<String> }. pub fn verify(ev: &TaskEvidence) -> VerifyResult { Promote | KeepPending { reason: String } }. Symbol extraction: regex captures (struct|enum|trait|fn|impl)\s+([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*). Commit match: git log --oneline -- <files> | grep -E '\(p[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)*\)|P[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)* | Task-Id:\s*P[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)*'.

tasks.name: Wire verifier into reconcile command
tasks.description: hex-cli/src/commands/plan/reconcile.rs: replace existing heuristic promotion with calls to reconcile_evidence::verify. When verify returns KeepPending { reason }, preserve the task's current status and log the reason at info level. When Promote, mark status=done and record evidence snapshot in a new task.evidence field (optional).

tasks.name: Regression test: wp-hex-native-web-search P2/P3 must NOT auto-promote
tasks.description: hex-cli/tests/reconcile_evidence.rs: load fixture workplan that mirrors wp-hex-native-web-search shape (P1 done with files present + commit, P2/P3 pending with missing files). Assert reconcile leaves P2/P3 as pending. Also fixture: all files present, symbols present, commit matches — assert promotion works.

phases.name: Remove passive reconcile triggers
phases.description: Reconcile must mutate only on explicit operator invocation. Audit and disable hooks/tick-handlers/file-watchers that call reconcile in write mode.

tasks.name: Audit passive reconcile call sites
tasks.description: grep the workspace and .claude/ for calls to reconcile (CLI, REST, Rust fn). For each caller, decide: keep (explicit operator), convert to --dry-run (reporting-only), or remove. Deliverable: hex-cli/src/commands/plan/reconcile.rs gains a mutate: bool parameter defaulting to false; existing write-path callers are audited and switched to mutate=true only where the caller is explicit operator intent.

tasks.name: Daemon tick uses --dry-run reconcile for reporting only
tasks.description: hex-cli/src/commands/brain.rs (or wherever the daemon tick lives): ensure the per-tick call passes mutate=false. If the tick currently mutates the workplan JSON, switch it to a report-only call that logs would-promote candidates without touching the file.

phases.name: Observability: queue history + reconcile diagnostics
phases.description: Operators must be able to audit daemon activity retrospectively and diagnose reconcile decisions per task.

tasks.name: brain queue list --include completed,failed --since <dur>
tasks.description: hex-cli/src/commands/brain.rs: extend the queue list subcommand with --include {pending|completed|failed|all} and --since <duration> (e.g. 1h, 30m). Backed by appending each completed task to HexFlo memory under scope brain-task-history:{uuid} with TTL 7 days, or a dedicated SpacetimeDB table if simpler.

tasks.name: hex plan reconcile --dry-run / --why <id> / --force <id>
tasks.description: --dry-run: runs collect_evidence + verify, prints per-task verdict + reasons, does not mutate. --why <task-id>: focuses on a single task, prints full evidence (files found/missing, symbols extracted/hit, commits matched/absent). --force <task-id>: promotes explicitly regardless of evidence; logs forced_by=<whoami> to brain_task_history for audit.

notes: Reconcile fixes should ideally be implemented by frontier Claude or by hand — a daemon dispatching this workplan may have reconcile false-positive its own fix tasks. If enqueued autonomously, verify each R* task end-to-end against git evidence before accepting daemon-reported completion.
